title: pyrus sterniana
intro: Pyrus sterniana, also known as the Himalayan wild apple or mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pyrus sterniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Pyrus sterniana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves, bark, or fruit, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
